examples: Most of us understand the discomfort we are inflicting on the poor schmo behind us and try to limit our reclining for the lights-out portion of the flight.
Today, right now in fact, you need to make a list of unique and exclusive advantages why the average Joe Schmo should order through your affiliate link and not one of your competitors.
Once the wizard is identified as just another schmo with a high-tech bullhorn, you begin to wonder why Dorothy can even continue to listen.
And Joe Schmo is getting angry.
